svg.text: Smoothed spearman is the main neighborhood-synchrony view; raw spearman stays alongside it as the strict per-position check.
rows and columns list each motif twice in F then R order | smoothing=centered_boxcar 25 bp
color scale: strong negative -> neutral -> strong positive | rows/columns are ordered F then R for every motif, so each TF-pair block reads F-F / F-R / R-F / R-R
amber dashed 2x2 diagonal blocks mark one motif's own F/R self-comparison; the off-diagonal cells inside those blocks are the mutual F↔R direction scores
ranked by |smoothed spearman|, then |raw spearman|; offset uses strand-specific primary peak start positions
SP1 (MA0079.5) F vs PATZ1 (MA1961.2) F | smoothed +0.968 | raw +0.505 | offset +586 bp
SP1 (MA0079.5) R vs PATZ1 (MA1961.2) R | smoothed +0.903 | raw +0.339 | offset -1 bp

KLF4 (MA0039.5) R vs PATZ1 (MA1961.2) F | smoothed +0.872 | raw +0.389 | offset -211 bp
KLF4 (MA0039.5) F vs SP1 (MA0079.5) R | smoothed +0.789 | raw +0.455 | offset -411 bp
KLF4 (MA0039.5) F vs PATZ1 (MA1961.2) R | smoothed +0.731 | raw +0.239 | offset -412 bp
